meta.name: Magneta Sprint D #3 wire — polygon
meta.description: Sprint D #3 redeploy of MagnetaOFTStandardFactory. Wires the new factory (0x19fd17f4b34E9a14AA63dd15c453d556627D7861) so cross-chain CREATE_TOKEN lands on it AND the new factory auto-registers freshly-minted tokens with TokenOpsModule (0xfB95B039c6Cd2Dfbf94D3e849D16Fc333B27c0C6) so users can MINT/UPDATE/ FREEZE without an extra registerByTokenOwner tx. Sign with Safe 0x4AeA3A398Db41b45e146c08131aD27c75b02EC2F.
